titleStmt.title: Washington, D.C., Howard University School of Divinity, Tweed Codex 100
Tweed Codex 100

editionStmt.p: The initial version of this file was created from data kindly provided by the Ethiopic Manuscript Imaging Project directed by Steve Delamarter.

publicationStmt.publisher: Die Schriftkultur des christlichen Äthiopiens und Eritreas: Eine multimediale Forschungsumgebung / Beta maṣāḥǝft

licence.p: This file is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike 4.0.

msContents.summary: Image of Gäbrä Mänfas Qǝddus, መልክአ፡ ገብረ፡ መንፈስ፡ ቅዱስ፡; Prayer of Simon the Stylite, in 118 chapters, ጸሎተ፡ ስምዖን፡ ዓምዳዊ፡; Prayer to Jesus Christ; Prayer to Mary; Prayer to Jesus Christ; Wisest of the Wise, ጠቢበ፡ ጠቢባን፡; Prayer against the Tongue of People, ልሳነ፡ ሰብእ፡; Hymns to Saint Theodore, Gälawǝdewos, and Fasilädäs; Canticle of the Flower, ማሕሌተ፡ ጽጌ፡; Hymn to Mary, ሰላም፡ ለኪ፡ መንበረ፡ ፀሐይ፡ ሰማይ፡ ወከዋክብት፡ አክሊላ፡; Commentary on the Nicaean Creed, ትርጓሜ: ጸሎተ: ሃይማኖት:

msItem.title: Prayer of Simon the Stylite, ጸሎተ፡ ስምዖን፡ ዓምዳዊ፡
msItem.incipit: በስመ፡ አብ፡ ወወልድ፡ ንዌጥን፡ በረድኤተ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ ክቡር፡ ወልዑል፡ ወቦ፡ ስነ፡ ስርሐቱ፡ በጽሒፈ አስተብቍዖት፡ እንተ፡ ዘስምዖን፡ ዓምዳዊ፡ ቀዳሚሃ፡ ዘእግዝእትነ፡ ቅድስት፡ ማርያም፡ ወድንግልት፡ በክልኤ፡ ወድኅረኒ፡ ይተሉ፡ አስተብቍዖት፡

msItem.title: Chapter thirty: Beginning Tuesday (ጸሎት፡ ዘሠሉስ፡)
msItem.incipit: ምዕራ፴ ኦእግዚእየ፡ ኢየሱስ፡ ክርስቶስ፡ ዘወረደ፡ መንፈስ፡ ቅዱስ፡ ላዕሌከ፡ በአምሳለ፡ ርግብ፡ አኅድር፡ ላዕሌየ፡ መንፈሰከ፡ ቅዱሰ፡ ወሕያው።

msItem.title: Chapter forty six: Beginning Wednesday ([ጸሎት፡] ዘረቡዕ፡)
msItem.incipit: ምዕራፍ፡ ፴፮። ኦእግዚእየ፡ ኢየሱስ፡ ክርስቶስ፡ ዘአድኃንኮሙ፡ ለአርዳኢከ፡ እማዕበለ፡ ባሕር፡ ወእመዋግዳት፡ ጽኑዓት፡ አድኅነኒ፡ እምሁከታት፡ ወድንጋፄ፡ እኩያት፡ ከመ፡ ሕየው፡ ብከ።

msItem.title: Chapter sixty seven: Beginning Thursday (ጸሎት፡ ዘሐሙስ፡)
msItem.incipit: ምዕራፍ፡ ፷፯። ኦ እግዚእየ፡ ኢየሱስ፡ ክርስቶስ፡ ረስየኒ፡ አምሳለ፡ አርዳኢከ፡ ከመ፡ እፃእ፡ እምዝንቱ፡ ዓለም፡ ወአእትቶ፡ እምኔየ፡ ወምላሕፍቅሮ፡ እምልብየ፡ እጸመድ፡ ወእትዓሠር፡ በዓርዑተ፡ ትእዛዝከ፡

msItem.title: Chapter seventy nine: Beginning Friday ([ጸሎት፡] ዘዓርብ፡)
msItem.incipit: ም፸፱፡ ኦእግዚእየ፡ ኢየሱስ፡ ክርስቶስ፡ ዘመጽኡ፡ ኀቤከ፡ ሰቃልያን። ወትቤሎሙ፡ መነሃ፡ ተኃሥሡ፡። ወይቤሉከ፡ ኢየሱስሃ፡ ናዝራዊ፡ ነኃሥሥ። ወአንተሂ፡ ትቤሎሙ፡ ኅድግዎ፡ ለእሉ፡ ይሖሩ፡ ወኃዙኒ፡ ሊተ፡ ወመጠውከ፡ ነፍስከ፡ ለሞት፡ ህየንተ፡ አርዳኢከ።

msItem.title: Chapter ninety two (the text indicates incorrectly that this is the beginning of Friday)
Chapter 108: Beginning of Sunday (ጸሎት፡ ዘሰንበተ፡ ክርስቲያን፡)
msItem.incipit: ም፻፰። ኦእግዚእየ፡ ኢየሱስ፡ ክርስቶስ፡ ዘዓርገ፡ ኀበ፡ መካን፡ ኅቡእ፡ እንዘ፡ ኢትትፈለጥ፡ እምኔነ። እድኅነኒ፡ እምአዕፅዳተ፡ ቄዳር፡ እለ፡ ይጸልኡ፡ ሰላመ።

msItem.title: Hymn to Jesus Christ
msItem.incipit: በስመ፡ አብ፡ ወወልድ፡ኦ፡ እግዚእየ፡ ኢየሱስ፡ ክርስቶስ፡ ወልደ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ ሕያው፡ በእንተ፡ ማርያም፡ ወላዲትከ፡ ርድአኒ፡

msItem.title: Prayer to Mary: “I Beseech You, O My Lady Mary,”ተማኅፀንኩ፤ ኦእግዝእትየ፡ ማርያም፡
msItem.incipit: በኵሉ፡ ሕማሙ፡ ዘዕለተ፡ ዓርብ፡ ለፍቁር፡ ወልድኪ፡ ተማኅፀንኩ፡ ኦእግዝእትየ፡ ማርያም። በእኅዞቱ፡ በመጣብሕ፡ ወበአብትር፡

msItem.title: Prayer to Jesus Christ, “O, Lord Jesus Christ, Only Son of the Father”
msItem.incipit: ጸሎት፡ ኦእግዚእየ፡ ኢየሱስ፡ ክርስቶስ፡ ዘዋሕድ፡ ለአቡሁ፡ አንተ፡ አምላኪየ፡ ወኪያከ ተሰፎኩ፡ አንተ፡ ተአምር፡ ዘይደልወኒ፡ ኢትኅድገኒ፡ አአብስ፡ በቅድሜከ፡

msItem.title: Hymn to Saint Theodore (Tewodros), “Greeting to you, Tewodros, Ornament and Grace of the Church.”
msItem.incipit: ሰላም፡ ለከ፡ ቴዎድሮስ፡ ሠርጕ፡ ለቤተ፡ ክርስቲያን፡ ሞገሳ፡

msItem.title: Malkǝʾ-hymn to Galawdewos
msItem.incipit: ሰላም፡ ለከ፡ ፩ ሰማዕተ፡ መዋዒ፡ እምነ፡ ኅሩያን፡ አእላፍ።

msItem.title: Hymn to Fasilädäs, “Greeting to you who rode on the fast horse,” ሰላም፡ ለከ፡ ተጸአኔ፡ ፈጣን፡ ፈረስ፡
Commentary on the Nicaean Creed, ትርጓሜ፡ ጸሎተ፡ ሃይማኖት፡
msItem.incipit: ጸሎተ፡ ሃይማኖት፡ ምን፡ አጽሐ(?)ዋእአው፡ ያሉ፡ እንደሆን፤ በእስክንድርያ፡ አርዮስ፡ የሚሉ፡ ዲያቆን፡ ነበረ። ወልድ፡ ፍጡር፡ አለ፡ወልድ፡ ፍጡር፡ ቢል፡ ተፍጻሜተ፡ ሰማዕት፡ ጴጥሮስ፡ ማኅበረ፡ እስክንድርያ፡ አውግዞ፡ ሰደደው።

collation.note: Quire descriptions: protection sheet and quires 1–11 balanced; quire 12 unbalanced.

list.item: 7 Fols 89–95 A folio stub is visible after fol. 95. Quire 12: 1, stub after 7

item.desc: the name of the original owner has been partially erased [XXX] ክረስቶስ፡
bottom margin: marginal pen trial, added in a later hand

A note on how to calculate the year of the evangelist. “Divide the year into four. If the remainder is one, the year is Matthew; if two, the year is Mark; if three, the year is Luke, if four, the year is John.”
Identified in the insurance hand list as Case A1
Numbered quires: quires 3–4; numbering restarts with quire 2 on
etc., words of text are written interlinearly
lines of text are written interlinearly

binding.decoNote: Parchment, four Coptic chain stitches attached with bridle attachments to rough-hewn boards of the traditional wood covered with a double-pocket fabric cover.

encodingDesc.p: Encoded according to the Beta maṣāḥǝft Guidelines. These Guidelines detail the TEI format ruled by the Beta maṣāḥǝft Schema. The present TEI file is enriched with an Xquery transformation taking advantage of the exist-db database instance where the data is stored and of the many external resources to which this data points to.

calendar.p: ʿĀmata ʿālam/ʿĀmata ʾəm-fəṭrat (Era of the World)
ʿĀmata śəggāwe (Era of the Incarnation – Ethiopian)

t:revisionDesc.change: Created XML record from EMIP Collection Metadata.xsls
Added quire maps, margin dims, columns/lines, binding desc, dating info.
